response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols as required, and the resume shows a career gap and minimal alignment with core technical competencies.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and DevOps tools
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed platforms
concerns: No demonstrated professional C++ or STL experience in the last 9+ years
Absence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Recent roles focus on web/cloud stacks, not on-premises high-performance C++ systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 exposure
